templates.body:
INTERVIEW SCORECARD · [Business]
Candidate: _______________  Role: _______________  Date: _______
Interviewer: _______________

CORE
[ ] why-this-job: notes _______________________
[ ] owned-mistake: notes _______________________
[ ] reliability: notes _______________________

ROLE-SPECIFIC
[ ] notes _______________________

FINISHERS (required)
1. Three adjectives + accomplishments:
   _____________________________________________
   Score: strong / adequate / weak / fail

2. Last book / learning:
   _____________________________________________
   Score: strong / adequate / weak / fail

3. Define success:
   _____________________________________________
   Score: strong / adequate / weak / fail

DECISION: hire / pass / maybe
Why (one sentence): _____________________________

If hire → mf-tpl-002 onboarding role_id: _________

5-MINUTE SCREEN

1. Still looking? Still available [days/hours]?
2. Pay range we can offer: [range]. Workable?
3. Anything that would keep you from starting [date]?
4. Schedule full interview or pass.

templates.use_when: After hire decision, before start date
templates.body:
REFERENCE (one call)

Hi, [Name] listed you as a reference for [role]. Two quick questions:
1. Would you hire them again for similar work?
2. Anything I should know about reliability or how they handle mistakes?

Thank you. [Do not fish for gossip.]

Subject: Update on your application ([Business])

Hi [Name],

Thank you for your time. We moved forward with another candidate.

We appreciate you considering us.

[Name]
